response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows or financial domain exposure, despite claiming 5–10 years of professional development; his work is centered on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile stacks with no evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or SQL Server/Oracle systems required for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical workshops
Experience with CI/CD, testing frameworks, and dev-ops infrastructure
concerns: No evidence of C++ development on Windows platform as mandatory requirement
Absence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
SQL experience listed generically without SQL Server or Oracle exposure
